titleStmt.title: SII 16.212: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 212. (A.R. No. 454 of 1923.) BHŪPATISAMUDRAM, RAYADRUG TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a tamarind grove in the village.
The inscription is dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to 1556 A.D., May 24, (Sunday). There was a lunar eclipse on this day.

It records that on the representation (of the villagers) that unauthorised taxes were being levied by the local officers (maṇihagāṇḍlu), Mahāmaṇdalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalayyadēva Mahārāju enquired into the complaint and remitted the taxes on the agrahāra village Bhūpatirāyasamudram alias Sarvajña-Kriyāśaktipuram for the merit of Viṭṭhalarājayyavāru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmacaṁdrāya namaḥ . śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśira
ścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayādbhudaya śālivāhana śa
kava¨rṣaṁbulu 1478 [Agu]nanēṭi naḷasaṁvatsara jyēṣṭha śu
15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrīsadāśivamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu
ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍa
gānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju (rāju) tiru
malayya dēvamahārājuluṁgāru śrīmadyajanādiṣa
ṭka¨rmmaniratalaina rāyadu¨rggaṁ śīmaku celēṭi . sa¨rvagnakri
yāsaktipurānaku pratināmaṁgala . bhūpatirāyasamu
draṁ sa¨rvamānyapu Agrahāraṁ Aśēṣavidvanmahājanā
lakuṁnu daṁḍaṁ peṭi yicina dha¨rmmaśilāśāsanakramameṭlana
nu . sadāśivamahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku
pāliṁcina rāyadu¨rggaṁ śīmaku celēṭi sa¨rvagnakriyā
śaktipurānaku pratināmaṁgala bhūpatirāya samu
draṁ . Agrahārānaku mēmu sa¨rvamānyaṁ cēśinavivaraṁ
mī Agrahāraṁ Aṁdu mā maṇihagāṁḍlu Anyāyaṁ
cēsi rokhaṁ koṁpōvucuṁnnārani mīru mātō ceppaṁgā
nu nēmu lekhalu parāmarśiṁci yī Agrahāraṁ Aṁ
du . mīku talāṁnu nēmu Accē māḍlalōna vajā vēyiṁ
stimi Agrahāraṁmaṁdu kṣētraṁbhāgālu cēsē Aṁdu
ku puccukonevuṁḍe kāṇikeluṁnu yivi mō
dalainavi mānitimi . mī Agrahāraṁ Aṁdu tappu
śēśina vārivallavacina Aparādhaṁ paṁnnu . mī Agra
hāraṁ Aṁdu dēvastānaṁ ceruvukuṁṭa kāluvalaku
cēsikonēṭaṭugānu kaṭṭaḍa jēstimi . yī modalaina
vi Aṁnninni viṭhalarājayavāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu mahā
vaiśākha śu 15 mi puṇyakālamaṁdu dhārapōśi yiccina [sa¨rva]
mānyadha¨rma śilāśāsanaṁ . yī dha¨rmānaku yevaru tapi
nānu tama mātāpitṛlanu kāśilō vadhiṁcina pāpāna
bōvuvāru . gōbrāhmalanu vadhiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvāru
Ani yiccina dha¨rma śilāśāsanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā . yō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhi[¨rva¨rṣa]sahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē . krimi . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sa¨rvēṣāmē
va bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na kara grāhyā (.) vipradattā vasuṁ
dharā . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
